title: osteospermum spinosum var. spinosum
intro: Osteospermum spinosum var. spinosum, also known as the prickly osteospermum, is a perennial plant species within the daisy family that is native to the southern parts of Africa. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues such as fever, cough, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of osteospermum spinosum var. spinosum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, osteospermum spinosum var. spinosum is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties, but more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human use.
